armor.name: Padded Armor
armor.description: Light armor. AC 11 + DEX. Stealth disadvantage.

armor.name: Scale Mail
armor.description: Medium armor. AC 14 + DEX (max +2), stealth disadvantage.

armor.name: Half Plate
armor.description: Medium armor. AC 15 + DEX (max +2), stealth disadvantage.

packs.name: Burglar's Pack
packs.description: Backpack, ball bearings, string, bell, candles, crowbar, hammer, pitons, hooded lantern, oil, rations, tinderbox, waterskin, hempen rope.

packs.name: Diplomat's Pack
packs.description: Chest, map cases, fine clothes, ink, pen, lamp, oil, paper, perfume, sealing wax, soap.

packs.name: Dungeoneer's Pack
packs.description: Backpack, crowbar, hammer, pitons, torches, tinderbox, rations, waterskin, hempen rope.

packs.name: Entertainer's Pack
packs.description: Backpack, bedroll, costumes, candles, rations, waterskin, disguise kit.

packs.name: Explorer's Pack
packs.description: Backpack, bedroll, mess kit, tinderbox, torches, rations, waterskin, hempen rope.

packs.name: Priest's Pack
packs.description: Backpack, blanket, candles, tinderbox, alms box, incense, censer, vestments, rations, waterskin.

packs.name: Scholar's Pack
packs.description: Backpack, book of lore, ink, ink pen, parchment, little bag of sand, small knife.

adventuring_gear.name: Arcane Focus
adventuring_gear.description: Special item used as spellcasting focus for arcane casters.

adventuring_gear.name: Component Pouch
adventuring_gear.description: Leather pouch for material spell components.

adventuring_gear.name: Holy Symbol
adventuring_gear.description: Divine focus for clerics and paladins.

adventuring_gear.name: Spellbook
adventuring_gear.description: Wizard's spellbook for recording and preparing spells.

adventuring_gear.name: Thieves' Tools
adventuring_gear.description: Tool set for lockpicking and trap interaction.
